---
title: "Data Dictionary"
---

## Purpose
Define the variables, types, and expected values for the datasets used in this project.

## Instructions
Complete the `data/codebook.csv` file. Ensure all variables used in scripts are documented there.

This document serves as the human-readable explanation of that codebook.

> **REPLACE THIS**: Provide any additional qualitative context about the variables that does not fit into the CSV format.

***

## AI Capability Checkpoint
*Optional guidance: Reflect on AI's use in extracting or formatting this data dictionary.*
